sources.name: SEC EDGAR: Coherent Fiscal 2026 Q3 Form 10-Q

financialMetrics.label: Revenue
financialMetrics.sourceText: Revenues $1,805,641 for the three months ended March 31, 2026, compared with $1,497,879 for the three months ended March 31, 2025.

financialMetrics.label: Cost of revenue
financialMetrics.sourceText: Cost of goods sold was $1,125,696 for the three months ended March 31, 2026, compared with $970,189 for the three months ended March 31, 2025.

financialMetrics.label: Net earnings attributable to Coherent Corp.
financialMetrics.sourceText: Net Earnings Attributable to Coherent Corp. was $191,402 for the three months ended March 31, 2026, compared with $15,711 for the three months ended March 31, 2025.

financialMetrics.label: Datacenter & Communications revenue
financialMetrics.sourceText: Datacenter & Communications revenues increased 41% to $1,362 million, compared to $969 million for the same period in the prior fiscal year.
financialMetrics.sourceSection: Management Discussion and Analysis / Results of Operations / Segment Results

financialMetrics.label: Datacenter & Communications segment profit
financialMetrics.sourceText: Datacenter & Communications segment profit increased 49% to $348 million, compared to $233 million for the same period last fiscal year.
financialMetrics.sourceSection: Management Discussion and Analysis / Results of Operations / Segment Results

financialMetrics.label: Industrial revenue
financialMetrics.sourceText: Industrial revenues decreased 16% to $444 million, compared to $529 million for the same period in the prior fiscal year.
financialMetrics.sourceSection: Management Discussion and Analysis / Results of Operations / Segment Results

reportedItems.label: Datacenter & Communications segment scope
reportedItems.text: Coherent's Datacenter & Communications segment sells into datacenter and communications markets and includes transceivers, systems, subsystems, modules, components, optics, and semiconductor devices.
reportedItems.sourceText: The Datacenter & Communications segment sells primarily into the datacenter and communications market, including transceivers, systems, subsystems, modules, components, optics, and semiconductor devices.

reportedItems.label: Datacenter & Communications revenue growth
reportedItems.text: Datacenter & Communications revenue was $1.362 billion in Q3 FY2026, up 41% year over year; segment profit was $348 million, up 49%.
reportedItems.sourceText: Revenues for the three months ended March 31, 2026 increased 41% to $1,362 million, compared to $969 million for the same period in the prior fiscal year.
reportedItems.sourceSection: Management Discussion and Analysis / Segment Results

reportedItems.label: AI datacenter demand attribution
reportedItems.text: Management attributed the quarter's growth to exceptionally strong demand across datacenter and communications, and said AI datacenter infrastructure scaling is driving capacity expansion.
reportedItems.sourceText: We delivered another quarter of strong financial performance ... driven by exceptionally strong demand across our datacenter and communications businesses. As AI datacenter infrastructure continues to scale, we are rapidly expanding capacity to meet demand.

reportedItems.label: Datacenter & Communications mix and pro forma growth
reportedItems.text: The investor presentation shows Datacenter & Communications as 75% of Q3 FY2026 revenue mix and 41% year-over-year growth on a pro forma basis.
reportedItems.sourceText: Q3 FY26 NON-GAAP FINANCIAL RESULTS: 41% Q3 FY26/Q3 FY25 Datacenter & Communications; 75% Datacenter & Communications; 25% Industrial.

reportedItems.label: InP platform and component capacity
reportedItems.text: The investor presentation says Coherent is ramping Datacenter and Communications capacity end to end, is on track to double internal InP output by year-end and more than double again by 2027, and uses a 6-inch platform producing EMLs, CW lasers, and photodiodes.
reportedItems.sourceText: Ramping Datacenter and Communications capacity - end to end, from materials to systems; On track to double internal InP output by year-end and more than double again by 2027; 6-inch platform producing EMLs, CW lasers, and photodiodes, with higher yields than 3-inch lines.

reportedItems.label: Transceiver and optical networking growth engines
reportedItems.text: The investor presentation lists transceivers at 1.6T, 3.2T, and 6.4T, DCI transceivers, transport/transmission, optical circuit switch, optical components, and multi-rail as growth engines, but does not disclose revenue or growth by individual product.
reportedItems.sourceText: Existing Growth Engines: Transceivers 1.6T, 3.2T, 6.4T; DCI Transceivers ZR/ZR+; Transport/Transmission; Optical Circuit Switch; Optical Components; Multi-rail.
reportedItems.sourceSection: Entering a new phase of accelerated growth

reportedItems.label: CPO/NPO timing
reportedItems.text: The investor presentation lists CPO/NPO as a new revenue item expected in H2 2026, indicating it is not presented as a current Q3 FY2026 revenue contributor.
reportedItems.sourceSection: Entering a new phase of accelerated growth

reportedItems.label: NVIDIA multi-year capacity agreement
reportedItems.text: Coherent entered into a multi-year capacity agreement with NVIDIA that may require incremental investment in equipment, labor, and working capital to support future production volumes through 2030; the arrangement may affect revenue concentration, gross margin, and capital expenditures as volumes ramp.
reportedItems.sourceText: On March 2, 2026, NVIDIA made a $2 billion investment in the Company through the purchase of shares of the Company’s Common Stock. The proceeds from the investment will be used to support research and development, future capacity and operations as we build out our manufacturing capabilities. We also entered into a multi-year capacity agreement that may require incremental investments in equipment, labor, and working capital to support future production volumes through 2030.
reportedItems.sourceSection: Liquidity and Capital Resources / Other Liquidity
